h3a68c25cg9cdbg415ag8a17g2934d7fb8036: The True Soul was infected with a tadpole. This Absolute of theirs must be a hallucination of sorts.
head811d3gc60cg442bg9804gc2cd962bc1bb: You think their 'god' is a mass delusion?
hc2756fe7ga4d5g4bf5g9a03g71f40125f465: Does it seem so far-fetched? These tadpoles are atypical - they connect our minds, reveal memories. They are capable of more than I'd imagined.
h57c1ea60g6d5bg49fbgacf8gf47673f908d3: Which means True Souls are not just deviant - they are dangerous.
h91688236gdb91g4ac1gba4bg997a38a1a525: I'm not so sure. Someone is talking to them, giving orders.
h0acd72dagc680g4843ga5ecgc59b0b6dedab: If this Absolute uses the tapoles to speak to True Souls, that makes them more than deviant. It makes them dangerous.
h89c82f43gf7dfg49c2g985cgd9a0f6f33a70: Yet I wonder. If the Absolute communes with the infected, why does it not commune with us?
